fork.task: Knight C3 — fork the King AND another piece!
fork.hint: From C3: B1,D1,A2,E2,A4,E4,B5,D5. Which is near the King?
fork.explain: Knight forks two pieces at once!

fork.task: Knight D2 — fork King E8 AND Rook A8!
fork.hint: Find the L-shape that threatens both pieces!

fork.task: Knight C3 — fork King D8 AND Queen D7!
fork.hint: Which jump from C3 attacks both D8 and D7 area?

double.task: DOUBLE ATTACK! Move the Rook to attack Queen AND King!
double.hint: Rook to D7 — captures Queen AND attacks King!

double.task: DOUBLE ATTACK! Rook to E5 — captures Rook AND attacks King!
double.hint: Rook E2 to E5 — takes Black Rook AND attacks King above!
double.explain: Double threat — takes Rook and attacks King!

double.task: DOUBLE ATTACK with the Queen! Attack King AND Pawn!
double.hint: Queen to D7 — captures pawn AND gives check!
double.explain: Queen takes pawn on D7 — check AND win material!
